properties.description: XFCE is a lightweight Linux desktop environment shown with Thunar file manager open (two windows), desktop icons, and a panel at the bottom.
Thunar is the default file manager for XFCE, shown in two open windows displaying folder icons in both icon and detail/list views with a left-side panel for places navigation.
The XFCE panel is a taskbar at the bottom of the screen containing the application menu, open window buttons, system tray icons, and clock.
XFCE supports desktop icons, visible as drive/volume icons on the left side of the desktop (e.g., storage devices like KINGSTON, VBO_LIVE).
